title: centaurea resupinata subsp. dufourii
intro: Centaurea resupinata subsp. dufourii, also known as Dufour's knapweed, is a rare species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have potential health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties. Centaurea resupinata subsp. dufourii is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
